case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TREASURER VS. HENRY DOMINQUEZ

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINQUEZ, HENRY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2018 BY PRO TEM JOHNATHAN POLLAND. 506 PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOANNE ADAMS, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOHNATHAN POLLAND; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMINQUEZ, HENRY $4,635.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,681.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
